explanation: This is the original true positive command and matches the Sigma rule as written.
Substituted '-WindowStyle' with '-w' and '-ep Bypass' with '-ep bypass' to test equivalent syntax.
Removed quotes around the command to test if the rule still detects the command without them.
Reordered '-noni' to the end of the command line to test reordering detection.
Omitted '-noni' since it is optional and the command still achieves similar behavior.
